scripts.build:ui: @powershell -Command "if (Test-Path .\dist) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .\dist } ; cd ../tentrio-projekti ; npm run build ; Copy-Item .\dist -Recurse ../tentrio-backend/"
scripts.deploy:full: npm run build:ui && cd ../tentrio-backend && git add . && git commit -m 'ui build' && git push
